name: Shadow Grader Fix
goal: Fix gemma4 shadow grader to produce correct tool-calling behavior and valid JSON output via system prompt guidance, JSON schema grammar enforcement, and arguments type safety

tasks.name: Add constants and prepend system prompt
tasks.description: Add GEMMA4_SYSTEM_PROMPT and GRADER_VERDICT_SCHEMA module-level constants. Prepend GEMMA4_SYSTEM_PROMPT to system message in grade_with_tools(). Add test verifying prepend behavior.

steps.description: Run new test to verify it fails (ImportError — GEMMA4_SYSTEM_PROMPT does not exist)
Add GEMMA4_SYSTEM_PROMPT and GRADER_VERDICT_SCHEMA constants after MAX_TOOL_STEPS line
Prepend GEMMA4_SYSTEM_PROMPT to system message in grade_with_tools() messages construction
Run new test to verify it passes

tasks.name: Add format enforcement on verdict calls
tasks.description: Add GRADER_VERDICT_SCHEMA to max-steps forced payload. Add verdict-enforcement block after regex fallback failure — one format-constrained retry before returning infrastructure_error. Add test verifying retry produces valid result.

steps.description: Run new test to verify it fails (currently returns infrastructure_error instead of retrying)
Add format: GRADER_VERDICT_SCHEMA to max-steps forced payload
Add verdict-enforcement block after regex fallback failure in post-loop JSON parsing
Run new test to verify it passes

tasks.name: Add arguments type safety in tool-call loop
tasks.description: Add isinstance check for string arguments in tool-call processing. Parse JSON string to dict before passing to _execute_tool. Add test verifying string arguments are handled correctly.

steps.description: Run new test to verify it fails (_execute_tool receives string instead of dict)
Replace tool-call for-loop with isinstance(args, str) check and json.loads parsing
Run new test to verify it passes

tasks.name: Run full test suite
tasks.description: Verify all 16 tests pass (13 original + 3 new). Pay special attention to test_non_json_verdict_returns_error which is most sensitive to the format enforcement changes.

steps.description: Verify test_non_json_verdict_returns_error explicitly (most sensitive to format enforcement changes)
